events.title: First Friday Raleigh
events.summary: Monthly art walk and gallery night across downtown Raleigh — a low-key way to meet locals and see the arts scene.

events.title: TechFest North Carolina
events.summary: Two-day regional tech conference covering software, AI, and infrastructure — strong RTP networking surface.

events.title: Bimbé Cultural Arts Festival
events.summary: Annual celebration of African and African-American arts, music, and food in downtown Durham.

events.title: Marbles Family Day
events.summary: Hands-on activities and special programming for families with kids ages 0–10.

events.title: Eno River Guided Hike
events.summary: Ranger-led hike through one of the Triangle's best preserved river ecosystems — great for transplants who want to see what the local outdoor scene looks like.

events.title: Triangle AI Tinkerers Demo Night
events.summary: Builder-focused AI meetup with live demos — popular with the local startup and ML engineering community.

events.title: RTP Frontier Networking Mixer
events.summary: Recurring informal gathering for RTP-area tech professionals — accessible to transplants and easy to attend solo.
